# Vendored Storm

Fortuna vendors the canonical `include/Storm/Storm.hpp` header from the immutable
Storm 5.1.0 release.

- Upstream: <https://github.com/BrokenShell/Storm>
- Release: `v5.1.0`
- Tagged commit: `2ae901281b2b852cbc3f4b426f786b10e4ed7593`
- Source asset: `Storm-5.1.0.tar.gz`
- Source asset SHA-256: `c135517e33c52816a6c31ae37457540c4376ac88d4bcba4afb512bed1e82bb2b`
- Header SHA-256: `76cf1f41f9783dff16776dc13b350652997fa6aa17bf20a52dee6b91beb311f2`
- License: MIT; see `LICENSE` in this directory.

Do not replace this header from Storm's moving default branch. Update it only as
an intentional dependency migration with a new immutable release and checksum.
